sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: pros first: protein is highly usable. reinforces the practical usefulness of the amino acid profile beyond the raw numbers. easy to fit into many meals. very adaptable in practical meal planning. can be filling for the calories. protein-rich foods often help fullness in practice.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: now the downsides: healthiness depends a lot on preparation. breaded or heavily fried versions can shift the health profile substantially. needs careful storage and cooking. food safety risk is a real practical drawback versus some wholefoods. comes with ethical sourcing questions. production context may matter to some viewers beyond nutrition alone.

closing.summary: Chicken Thigh does have a few real-world upsides. but the nutrition case is still weak and the downsides drag it down hard. best only if convenience, budget, or taste matters more than getting the cleanest meat option.
closing.useCaseNote: Best only if convenience, budget, or taste matters more than getting the cleanest meat option.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?
